name: vnc_screenshot
description: Capture a screenshot of the remote desktop. Returns a JPEG image encoded as base64. Use this to see what is currently displayed on the screen. WARNING: The returned frame may be up to 500ms stale due to VNC server polling. Do NOT rely solely on screenshots for click targeting — use vnc_window_list or vnc_active_window for authoritative window positions, and vnc_ocr_region to verify text content.

endpoint.description: Endpoint ID to capture from. If omitted, uses the default endpoint.

delay.description: Milliseconds to wait before capturing, allowing the screen to settle after prior actions. Default: 0.

name: vnc_probe
description: Place a yellow marker at specific coordinates on a screenshot WITHOUT clicking or interacting with the remote desktop. The marker is drawn server-side on the image only — no mouse movement, no focus change, no menus closed. Use this to visually verify computed coordinates before committing to a click.

name: vnc_grid
description: Overlay a labeled coordinate grid on a screenshot WITHOUT clicking or interacting with the remote desktop. Divides the screen into a grid of cells labeled A1-P12 (columns A-P, rows 1-12). Returns the annotated screenshot AND a text mapping of every cell label to its center pixel coordinate. Use this to identify click targets by cell label, then click at the cell center coordinates. Much faster than multiple probe calls. The grid is drawn server-side only — no remote desktop interaction.

name: vnc_click
description: Click at a specific screen position. Supports left, right, and middle mouse buttons, and double-click. Returns both a text confirmation with coordinates AND a screenshot showing a yellow marker ring at the exact click point for visual verification. If the helper agent is running, the marker overlay is drawn on screen before the screenshot is captured. IMPORTANT: Before clicking, verify the target window is in the foreground using vnc_active_window, and confirm coordinates using vnc_window_list or vnc_ocr_region. Prefer keyboard shortcuts (Alt+Tab, Tab, Enter) over clicks when possible.

name: vnc_type_text
description: Type a string of text on the remote desktop using direct keysym events. Each character is sent as its exact Unicode keysym — no shift-key workarounds needed. For special characters that may not work reliably, use vnc_paste_text instead.

name: vnc_key_press
description: Press a key or key combination (e.g., 'Return', 'ctrl+c', 'alt+F4', 'shift+a'). Key names follow X11 keysym names.

name: vnc_move_mouse
description: Move the mouse cursor to a position without clicking.

name: vnc_drag
description: Click and drag from one position to another. Holds the left mouse button down during the move.

name: vnc_clipboard_set
description: Send text to the remote clipboard via VNC ClientCutText.

text.description: Text to place on remote clipboard

name: vnc_paste_text
description: Reliable text entry: sets the remote clipboard then sends Ctrl+V. Use this for special characters, URLs, or any text that vnc_type_text might mangle.

name: vnc_list_endpoints
description: List all registered VNC endpoints with their descriptions and connection status.

name: vnc_cursor_position
description: Get the current mouse cursor position on the remote desktop. Requires the vnc-helper agent running on the target machine.

name: vnc_window_list
description: List all visible windows on the remote desktop with their titles, positions, sizes, and process IDs. Requires the vnc-helper agent.

name: vnc_active_window
description: Get information about the currently focused window on the remote desktop including title, class, position, size, and PID. Requires the vnc-helper agent.

name: vnc_set_active_window
description: Set the active/focused window by title substring, window class name, or process ID. The matched window is restored (if minimized), brought to the foreground, and given keyboard focus. Returns the activated window's details (title, class, position, size, PID). Requires the vnc-helper agent.

title.description: Window title substring to match (partial match)

class.description: Window class name to match (exact match)

pid.description: Process ID of the window to activate

name: vnc_manage_window
description: Minimize, maximize, restore, or close a window found by title, class, or PID. Requires the vnc-helper agent.

action.description: Action to perform: minimize, maximize, restore, close

title.description: Window title substring to match (partial match)

class.description: Window class name to match (exact match)

name: vnc_run_command
description: Execute a command on the remote Windows machine and return stdout, stderr, and exit code. The command is passed to cmd.exe /c. Requires the vnc-helper agent. Use this for operations that don't need GUI interaction.

name: vnc_screen_info
description: Get screen information including monitor layout, resolution, and DPI from the remote desktop. Requires the vnc-helper agent.

name: vnc_upload_file
description: Upload a file from the local machine to the remote desktop. Reads the local file, base64-encodes it, and sends to the helper agent which writes it to the specified remote path. Max 10MB. Requires the vnc-helper agent.

local_path.description: Absolute path to the file on the local (FreeBSD/Linux) machine

remote_path.description: Absolute path where the file should be written on the remote (Windows) machine

name: vnc_download_file
description: Download a file from the remote desktop to the local machine. The helper agent reads the remote file, base64-encodes it, and the MCP server saves it locally. Max 10MB. Requires the vnc-helper agent.

remote_path.description: Absolute path to the file on the remote (Windows) machine

local_path.description: Absolute path where the file should be saved on the local (FreeBSD/Linux) machine

name: vnc_ocr_region
description: Recognize text in a screen region using OCR (Windows.Media.Ocr). Captures the specified rectangle from the remote desktop and returns the recognized text. Requires the vnc-helper agent and vnc-ocr.ps1 on the target machine (Win10/11). Latency is ~1-2s due to PowerShell startup.

x.description: X coordinate of the top-left corner of the region

y.description: Y coordinate of the top-left corner of the region

w.description: Width of the region in pixels (max 4096)

h.description: Height of the region in pixels (max 4096)

lang.description: OCR language tag (e.g. "en-US", "es", "ja"). Default: system language.

name: vnc_clipboard_get
description: Read the last clipboard text received from the remote desktop via VNC ServerCutText. The VNC server sends clipboard updates when the user copies text on the remote machine. Returns the most recent clipboard content, or a message if no clipboard data has been received yet.

name: vnc_helper_clipboard_get
description: Read the current Windows clipboard text using the Windows API directly (CF_UNICODETEXT). Unlike vnc_clipboard_get which reads VNC protocol clipboard data, this reads the actual Windows clipboard with full Unicode support. Requires the vnc-helper agent.

name: vnc_helper_clipboard_set
description: Set the Windows clipboard text using the Windows API directly (CF_UNICODETEXT). Supports full Unicode including CJK, emoji, and special characters. More reliable than vnc_clipboard_set which uses the VNC protocol (Latin-1 only). After setting, use vnc_key_press with Ctrl+V to paste. Requires the vnc-helper agent.

text.description: Text to place on the clipboard (UTF-8, full Unicode support)

name: vnc_ui_tree
description: Get the accessibility tree of the foreground window (or a specific process). Returns a hierarchical JSON structure with element names, control types, automation IDs, positions, and sizes. Use this to understand the UI structure before interacting with elements. Much more reliable than screenshots for identifying interactive controls. Requires the vnc-helper agent.

depth.description: Maximum tree depth (1-10). Default: 3. Higher values return more detail but take longer.

pid.description: Process ID to inspect. If omitted, uses the foreground window.

name: vnc_ui_element_text
description: Get the text or value of a UI element found by name or automation ID. Works with text boxes, labels, combo boxes, and other text-bearing controls. More reliable than OCR for reading specific control values. Requires the vnc-helper agent.

name.description: Element name to search for (partial match on element Name property)

automation_id.description: AutomationId to search for (exact match, more reliable than name)

control_type.description: Filter by control type: Button, Edit, Text, ComboBox, CheckBox, RadioButton, ListItem, TreeItem, MenuItem, Window, etc.

name: vnc_ui_click_element
description: Find a UI element by name or automation ID and invoke its default action (click button, toggle checkbox, select item, expand dropdown). More reliable than coordinate-based clicking because it uses the UI Automation Invoke/Toggle/Select patterns directly. Requires the vnc-helper agent.

name.description: Element name to find and click

automation_id.description: AutomationId to find and click (more reliable than name)

control_type.description: Filter by control type to disambiguate: Button, CheckBox, RadioButton, MenuItem, ListItem, TreeItem, etc.

name: vnc_registry_read
description: Read a Windows registry value. Returns the value data with its type (REG_SZ, REG_DWORD, REG_QWORD, REG_BINARY, REG_MULTI_SZ, REG_EXPAND_SZ). Requires the vnc-helper agent.

key.description: Registry key path (e.g., "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion"). Root keys: HKLM, HKCU, HKCR, HKU, HKCC.

value.description: Value name to read. If omitted, reads the (Default) value.

name: vnc_registry_write
description: Write a Windows registry value. Creates the key if it does not exist. Supports REG_SZ (default), REG_DWORD, and REG_EXPAND_SZ types. Requires the vnc-helper agent.

value.description: Value name to write. If omitted, writes the (Default) value.

type.description: Registry value type: REG_SZ (default), REG_DWORD, or REG_EXPAND_SZ.

data.description: Value data. String for REG_SZ/REG_EXPAND_SZ, integer for REG_DWORD.

name: vnc_registry_list
description: Enumerate subkeys and values under a Windows registry key. Returns subkey names and value entries (name, type, size). Requires the vnc-helper agent.

name: vnc_list_processes
description: List all running processes on the remote desktop. Returns process name, PID, parent PID, and thread count for each process. Requires the vnc-helper agent.

name: vnc_kill_process
description: Terminate a process on the remote desktop by PID or executable name. If name is provided without PID, kills the first matching process. Requires the vnc-helper agent.

name: vnc_list_services
description: List all Windows services on the remote desktop. Returns service name, display name, and current status (running, stopped, etc.). Requires the vnc-helper agent.

name: vnc_service_control
description: Start, stop, or restart a Windows service by its service name. Requires the vnc-helper agent.

name.description: Windows service name (not display name, e.g., "wuauserv" for Windows Update)

action.description: Action to perform on the service
